LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT LIZA SANCHEZ'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, AS TO BOTH CAUSES OF ACTION IN THE COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF RAZOR CAPITAL, INC. ADEQUATELY ALLEGES THAT IT IS THE ASSIGNEE OF THE CREDIT ACCOUNT THAT IS THE BASIS FOR BOTH CAUSES OF ACTION. WRITTEN ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED. (D302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2017 Set For Trial On Jul-17-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-17-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT LIZA SANCHEZ'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, as to both causes of action in the complaint is OVERRULED. Plaintiff Razor Capital, Inc. adequately alleges that it is the assignee of the credit account that is the basis for both causes of action. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D302)
